news-korea-econ.title: Trump’s Middle East envoy reveals what led to breakdown in Iran talks before Operation Epic Fury
news-korea-econ.description: U.S. Middle East envoy reveals what led to the collapse of the Iran nuclear talks, ultimately leading to Operation Epic Fury launch.

news-global-econ.title: Trump endorses Texas congressional candidate after rival drops out over affair scandal
news-global-econ.description: President Donald Trump endorsed Texas Republican Brandon Herrera after Rep. Tony Gonzales bowed out of the race amid a House Ethics investigation into an admitted affair with a former staffer.

news-global-econ.title: Trump suddenly seems anxious to end the war as American casualties mount and Iran finds ways to hit back
news-global-econ.description: Trump's military campaign against Iran is facing unexpected resistance, as officials report 140 U.S. service members were wounded in initial strikes.

news-global-econ.title: BlackRock CEO Larry Fink argues US-Iran conflict won't derail economy as gas prices surge
news-global-econ.description: BlackRock CEO Larry Fink predicts the U.S. war with Iran will not last long, and oil prices could fall below $50 per barrel once the conflict ends and Iran reenters global markets.

news-global-econ.title: 'Unprecedented' agreement releases emergency oil reserves as gas prices spark concerns
news-global-econ.description: A cohort of developed nations agreed to release a record amount of emergency oil reserves Wednesday amid the impact that the U.S. attacks against Iran have had on the oil market.

news-global-econ.title: Victor Davis Hanson: Iran Launched About 5 Times More Missiles At Israel And Achieved Fewer Results
news-global-econ.description: Hoover Institution senior fellow Victor Davis Hanson discusses how the Trump administration is handling the conflict in Iran on 'The Ingraham Angle.'

news-korea-soc.title: North Korea Elbows into Iran Conflict, Pledging Support for 'Supreme Leader'
news-korea-soc.description:
North Korea on Wednesday announced its support for Iran’s new Supreme Leader, Mojtaba Khamenei, and denounced what it called “illegal” attacks on Iran by the United States and Israel.

news-global-soc.title: Airport security strain during shutdown grows as unpaid TSA officers warn, ‘We’re hurting’
news-global-soc.description: TSA agents are working without paychecks as the government shutdown continues, with an officer sharing financial struggles and family hardships during the funding lapse.

news-global-soc.title: Exclusive— Trump Administration Official: China Threatened to Detain All Panamanian-Flagged Vessels at Chinese Ports
news-global-soc.description: A Trump administration official told Breitbart News that Chinese officials have now threatened to detain Panamanian-flagged vessels in China, something that could disrupt global commerce and represents retaliation against Panama for recent developments taking…

news-global-soc.title: One Billion Identity Records Across 26 Countries Exposed in Data Leak
news-global-soc.description:
Roughly one billion sensitive records across 26 countries have been exposed as part of a massive data leak, although the company impacted maintains it has no indication that customer data has been compromised.
